marshallese.soft_landing_desc: Ilo 3+ iiō: eddekḷọk 2–4%, orḷọk in oṇāān 1–3%, ejjeḷọk jerbal <5%
marshallese.logged_3_policy_mixes: Kwaar jeje 3+ kobaḷọk in karōk ilo Kajjitōk in Karōk
marshallese.household_spending_on_goods_and_servic: Ṃani ko baaṃle ko rej kōḷḷā kōn ṃweiuk im jerbal. Ej ṃōttan eo eḷaptata ilo GDP.
marshallese.business_spending_on_capital_goods_new: Ṃani ko peejnej ko rej kōḷḷā kōn kein jerbal, ekkal ekāāl, im oktak ilo ṃweiuk ko rej kōjparoki.
marshallese.government_spending_on_goods_and_servi: Ṃani ko kien ej kōḷḷā kōn ṃweiuk im jerbal (ejjab koba ṃani ko rej leḷọk āinwōt Social Security).
marshallese.exports_minus_imports_currently_negati: Jilkinḷọk ṃweiuk kadikḷọk bōktok ṃweiuk. Kiiō ej ilaḷ ñan Amedka (eḷapḷọk aer bōktok jān aer jilkinḷọk).
marshallese.percentage_change_in_real_gdp_2_3_is_h: Oktak in pāsōnt ilo GDP eṃool. 2-3% ej eṃṃan.
marshallese.measures_average_price_changes_the_mai: Ej joñe oktak in oṇāān eoḷap. Ej kein joñe eo eḷaptata ñan orḷọk in oṇāān.
marshallese.percent_of_labor_force_without_jobs_na: Pāsōnt in ri-jerbal ro ejjeḷọk aer jerbal. Joñan eo eṃool ej ~4%.
marshallese.interest_rate_banks_charge_each_other_: Oṇāān ṃuri eo pāāñ ko rej bōke jān doon. Ej kein jerbal eo eḷaptata an Fed.
marshallese.index_of_500_large_us_companies_proxy_: Joñak in 500 koṃbani ko reḷap ilo Amedka. Ej kwaḷọk kōkḷaḷ in ṃakete in ṃōttan.
marshallese.survey_of_how_optimistic_consumers_fee: Kajjitōk ñan lale ewi joñan an ri-wia ro kōjatdikdik kōn ekonomi eo.
marshallese.number_of_new_residential_construction: Oran jerbal in ekkal eṃ ekāāl ko rej jino.
marshallese.exports_minus_imports_surplus_positive: Jilkinḷọk ṃweiuk kadikḷọk bōktok ṃweiuk. Ḷapḷọk = ilōñ, iietḷọk = ilaḷ.
marshallese.total_government_borrowing_us_debt_is_: Aolepen ṃuri an kien. Ṃuri an Amedka ej ~$34 trillion (2024).
marshallese.plots_interest_rates_vs_bond_maturity_: Ej kwaḷọk oṇāān ṃuri ippān iien an bond kalliṃur. Ñe ej oktak = kōkḷaḷ in wōtlọk in ekonomi.
marshallese.survey_of_manufacturing_activity_50_ex: Kajjitōk kōn jerbal in kōṃṃan ṃweiuk. >50 = eddekḷọk, <50 = dikḷọk.
marshallese.measures_income_inequality_0_perfect_e: Ej joñe oktak in ṃani ikōtaan armej. 0 = joñan wōt juon, 1 = oktak eḷaptata.
marshallese.the_most_popular_simple_budgeting_fram: Wāween karōk ṃani eo epidodo im buñbuñtata.
marshallese.save_a_fixed_percentage_before_spendin: Kōjparok juon pāsōnt ejjab oktak ṂOKTA jān aṃ kōḷḷā kōn jabdewōt bar juon men.
marshallese.zero_based_budget: Karōk Ṃani ej Jeṃḷọk ilo Jirouk
marshallese.every_dollar_gets_assigned_a_job_incom: Kajjojo taḷa ej bōk juon jerbal. Ṃani ej deḷọñ kadikḷọk ṃani ej ilọk = jirouk wōt.
marshallese.what_should_you_do_first: Ta eo kwōj aikuj kōṃṃane ṂOKTA?
marshallese.why_doesn_t_gas_demand_drop_as_much_as: Etke kōṇaan in kiaj ejjab wōtlọk āinwōt aṃ kar ḷōmṇak?
marshallese.why_does_raising_rates_hurt_stocks: Etke lelōñḷọk oṇāān ṃuri ej kọkkure oṇāān ṃōttan ko?
marshallese.which_country_has_comparative_advantag: Aelōñ ta eo eṃṃanḷọk an kōṃṃan kōmpiuta ilo keidi?
marshallese.what_is_the_most_likely_long_term_effe: Ta eo emaroñtata waḷọk ilo iien etto?
marshallese.what_is_the_true_cost_of_grad_school: Ta oṇāān EṂOOL in jikuuḷ ko reutiej?
marshallese.what_economic_consequence_followed_in_: Ta jelōt in ekonomi ear ḷoore ilo 2021-2022?
marshallese.what_will_the_other_station_likely_do: Ta eo jikin kiaj eo juon enaaj kōṃṃane?
marshallese.what_type_of_market_failure_is_this: Men in ej kain jorrāān in ṃakete ta?
marshallese.how_much_should_you_contribute_at_mini: Jete eo kwōj aikuj likūt ie, ilo joñan eo edik tata?
marshallese.price_rises_less_demanded_more_supplie: Ñe oṇāān ej wanlōñḷọk → edik kōṇaan, eḷapḷọk leḷọk. Ñe oṇāān ej wanlaḷḷọk → eḷapḷọk kōṇaan, edik leḷọk. Ijo rej iioon doon: ijo S ej iioon D ie.
marshallese.gdp_c_i_g_x_m_consumption_investment_g: GDP = C + I + G + (X-M). Kōjerbal Ṃweiuk + Likūt Ṃani + Kien + Jilkinḷọk Ṃweiuk. Ej joñe aolepen ṃweiuk im jerbal ej waḷọk.
marshallese.inflation_types: Kain ko in Orḷọk in Oṇāān
marshallese.demand_pull_too_much_money_chasing_goo: Kōṇaan-tōbtōb: eḷap ṃani ej ḷoor ṃweiuk edik. Oṇāān-iuuni: oṇāān kōṃṃan ṃweiuk ej wanlōñḷọk. Pādwōt: armej rej ḷōmṇak bwe oṇāān im wōṇāān renaaj wanlōñḷọk wōt.
marshallese.interest_rates_ffr_open_market_operati: Oṇāān ṃuri (FFR) • Wia im wiakake bond ilo ṃakete • Ṃani ko pāāñ rej aikuj kōjparoki • Wūntō in ṃuri • Naan in kajjitōk kōn iien ej itok
marshallese.fiscal_vs_monetary: Karōk in Owōj im Karōk in Ṃani
marshallese.fiscal_congress_tax_spend_monetary_fed: Karōk in owōj = Congress (owōj/kōḷḷā). Karōk in ṃani = Fed (oṇāān ṃuri/joñan ṃani). Erro rej jelōt ekonomi ilo wāween ko rej oktak.
marshallese.divide_72_by_the_interest_rate_to_find: Ajej 72 kōn oṇāān ṃuri bwe kwōn jeḷā jete iiō ñan an ruoḷọk ṃani eo aṃ. 72 ÷ 8% = 9 iiō ñan an ruoḷọk.
marshallese.elastic_1_luxury_has_substitutes_inela: Pidodo (>1): men in ṃōṇōṇō, ewōr men ko jet emaroñ pinej jenkwan. Pen (<1): aikuj otem aikuj, ejjeḷọk men in pinej jenkwan. Joñan wōt juon (=1): oktak in % ilo P = oktak in % ilo Q.
marshallese.perfect_competition_monopolistic_compe: Iāekwōj Eweeppān → Iāekwōj kōn Ṃweiuk Eoktak → Jejjo Wōt Ri-Wiakake → Juon Wōt Ri-Wiakake. Eḷapḷọk kajoor ilo ṃakete = eḷapḷọk oṇāān, edikḷọk jerbal eṃṃan.
marshallese.canvas_summary_supply_demand: Annañ in leḷọk im kōṇaan ej kwaḷọk kōṇaan, leḷọk, oṇāān in iioon, joñan in iioon, ḷapḷọk, iietḷọk, im jelōt in owōj.
marshallese.canvas_summary_shortage: Jabōn oṇāān ilōñ ej jerbal: iietḷọk enañin
marshallese.canvas_summary_surplus: Jabōn oṇāān ilaḷ ej jerbal: ḷapḷọk enañin
marshallese.canvas_probe_hint: Kōttūr annañ eo — ak likūt aṃ lale im kōjerbal kii in arrow ko — bwe kwōn etale oṇāān ippān ri-wia im oṇāān an ri-kōṃṃan ilo jabdewōt joñan.
marshallese.canvas_summary_personal_finance: Annañ in ṃani eo aṃ make ej kwaḷọk juon annañ doulul in karōk ṃani ilo allōñ im ewi joñan an ṃani eddekḷọk kōn orḷọk kobaḷọk.
marshallese.canvas_summary_stock_market: Annañ in ṃakete in ṃōttan ej kwaḷọk bwebwenato in oṇāān an koṃbani eo kwaar kāālōte, ṃani ilo kobban ṃōttan ko, ṃōttan ko ippaṃ, im oṇāān kiiō.
marshallese.canvas_summary_stock_market_empty: Jikin annañ in ṃakete in ṃōttan ej pojak ñan juon ṃakete ekāāl. Jino kōṃṃane ṃakete eo bwe kwōn lo bwebwenato in oṇāān im ṃōttan ko ippaṃ.
marshallese.canvas_summary_business: Jikin lale in peejnej ej kwaḷọk ṃani, buñbuñ, oṇāān kajjojo ṃōttan, ijo eṃōj kōḷḷā aolep oṇāān ie, im bwebwenato in orḷọk ilo raan otemjej.
marshallese.canvas_summary_business_empty: Jikin lale in peejnej ejjañin obrak. Jino juon peejnej ilaḷ bwe kwōn lo ṃani, buñbuñ, im orḷọk in raan ijin.
marshallese.canvas_summary_macro: Jikin lale in ekonomi in aelōñ ej kwaḷọk eddekḷọk in GDP, orḷọk in oṇāān, oṇāān ṃuri, ejjeḷọk jerbal, joñak in wia, im bwebwenato in karōk.
marshallese.canvas_summary_inquiry: Wāween kajjitōk in karōk ej kōjerbal emān kein tōbtōb in karōk bwe en kwaḷọk juon jelōt makro in katak. Kōjerbal baar in karōk ko ilaḷ bwe kwōn keidi oktak in GDP, orḷọk in oṇāān, im ejjeḷọk jerbal.
marshallese.teacher_prompt_supply_demand: Kajjitōk ippān ri-jikuuḷ ro bwe ren ba ṃokta eḷaññe oṇāān, joñan, ḷapḷọk, ak iietḷọk enaaj oktak, ṃokta jān aer tōbtōb juon kein tōbtōb.
marshallese.teacher_prompt_personal_finance: Kajjitōk ippān ri-jikuuḷ ro bwe ren kwaḷọk juon men eṃōj kōtḷọke ilo karōk ṃani eo, im juon un etke orḷọk kobaḷọk ej leḷọk ṃōṇōṇō ñan ro rej jino ṃokta.
marshallese.teacher_prompt_stock_market: Kajjitōk ippān ri-jikuuḷ ro bwe ren kōjenolọk ilo juon wōt kōmeḷeḷe: eṃṃakūt in oṇāān, kajoor in peejnej eo, im kauwōtata in kobban ṃōttan ko.
marshallese.teacher_prompt_entrepreneur: Kajjitōk ippān ri-jikuuḷ ro bwe ren watōk jete kab ren aikuj wiakake bwe ren tōpar ijo eṃōj kōḷḷā aolep oṇāān ie, ṃokta jān aer kapeḷḷọk peejnej eo ñan raan eo.
marshallese.teacher_prompt_macro: Kajjitōk ippān ri-jikuuḷ ro bwe ren kāālōt juon mejānkajjik in karōk im kwaḷọk kein joñe eo enaaj kwaḷọk eṃṃan ak nana.
marshallese.teacher_prompt_inquiry: Kajjitōk ippān ri-jikuuḷ ro kein tōbtōb in karōk ta eo ri-meḷeḷe in ekonomi rej jumae doon kake eḷaptata, innem ren kōmeḷeḷeik etke men in ej juon wōt kein jipañ katak.
marshallese.back_to_stem_tools: Rọọl ñan kein jerbal in STEM
marshallese.literacy_tooltip: Jeḷāḷọkjeṇ in ekonomi ej eddekḷọk kōn ḷōmṇak ko kwaar katak, iiō ko kwaar kōṃṃani ilo kein kōṃṃan ko, jiṃwe in teej, im men ko kwaar tōpari
marshallese.topic_tabs: Katak ko in Jikin Katak in Ekonomi
marshallese.supply_demand_the_price_discovery_engi: Leḷọk im Kōṇaan — wāween an ṃakete lo oṇāān
marshallese.demand_slopes_down_cheap_buy_more_supp: Lain in kōṇaan ej wanlaḷḷọk (edik oṇāān = eḷapḷọk aer wia); lain in leḷọk ej wanlōñḷọk (eḷap oṇāān = eḷapḷọk aer kōṃṃan). Oṇāān im joñan in iioon ej ijo rej kijoone doon ie. Bok eo an Adam Smith ilo 1776, Wealth of Nations, ej ḷoñtak eo wōt.
marshallese.personal_finance_budgeting_saving_cred: Ṃani eo Aṃ Make — karōk ṃani, kōjparok, ṃuri
marshallese.50_30_20_needs_wants_save_compound_int: 50/30/20: aikuj / kōṇaan / kōjparok. Orḷọk kobaḷọk ej men in bwilōñ eo kein ka ruwalitōk; ñe kwōj jino 30 iiō ṃokta ilo 7%, $1 ej erom $7.61. Kōḷḷā aolepen kaat in ṃuri ko — 19% APR ej āinwōt oṇāān an ri-kowadoñ.
marshallese.stock_market_ownership_at_fractional_s: Ṃakete in Ṃōttan — aṃ bōk juon ṃōttan dik
marshallese.buy_a_share_own_a_slice_of_the_company: Wia juon ṃōttan = aṃ bōk juon ṃōttan in koṃbani eo. S&P 500 ear leḷọk enañin ~10% orḷọk ilo juon iiō iuṃwin 100 iiō. Ajej ṃani eo aṃ (jab likūt aolep ilo juon wōt koṃbani), im dāpij iuṃwin iien etto (pād ilo ṃakete eo eṃṃanḷọk jān pukot iien eṃṃan).
marshallese.revenue_costs_profit_break_even_point_: Ṃani ej deḷọñ − oṇāān = orḷọk. Ijo eṃōj kōḷḷā aolep oṇāān ie ej ñe eṃōj kōḷḷā oṇāān ko rejjab oktak. Elōñ peejnej ko re-dik rej buñ ilo iiō eo kein ka 5; ro rej mour wōt raar lo ṃweiuk ko ṃakete ej kōṇaan. Oṇāān bōktok juon ri-wia (CAC) ippān oṇāān an ri-wia eo iuṃwin aolepen iien (LTV) ej bwini eo an ri-jino ilo raan otemjej.
marshallese.national_economy_gdp_inflation_unemplo: Ekonomi in Aelōñ — GDP, orḷọk in oṇāān, ejjeḷọk jerbal
marshallese.gdp_measures_total_output_cpi_measures: GDP ej joñe aolepen ṃweiuk im jerbal ej waḷọk; CPI ej joñe orḷọk in oṇāān; ejjeḷọk jerbal U-3 ej joñan eo eḷaptata rej kōnono kake. Fed ej likūt oṇāān ṃuri bwe en joñak ikōtaan eddekḷọk im orḷọk in oṇāān — jerbal ko ruo Congress ear liḷọk ñane ilo 1977.
marshallese.policy_inquiry_hero: Kajjitōk in Karōk — ejjeḷọk uwaak eṃōj ṇooje
marshallese.policy_inquiry_hero_hint: Ṃakūtkūt kein tōbtōb ko, ba ṂOKTA ewi wāween ekonomi enaaj pād ie ṃokta jān aṃ riiti, innem kwaḷọk unin aṃ ḷōmṇak. Ri-meḷeḷe in ekonomi ro reṃool rej lukkuun jumae doon kōn kōkḷaḷ im joñan kein.
marshallese.try_supply_demand: Kajjioñ: likūt Jabōn Oṇāān Ilōñ ñan $30 (kōṃadṃōd oṇāān in reent). Ba ṃokta — jete ṃōttan enaaj iietḷọk ilo ṃakete eo?
marshallese.try_personal_finance: Kajjioñ: likūt 15% ilo Balanced im kāālōt jikin jokwe eo Ri-jokwe Ippaṃ. Lale aolepen ṃweiuk ippān ṃani iuṃwin 5 iiō.
marshallese.try_stock_market: Kajjioñ: wia im wiakake iuṃwin 5 raan, innem keidi orḷọk eo aṃ ippān taal in Index (dāpij). Wōn ej anjọ?
marshallese.try_entrepreneur: Kajjioñ: lo ijo eṃōj kōḷḷā aolep oṇāān ie ṃokta jān aṃ kapeḷḷọk, innem māllejoñ juon oṇāān 50% eḷapḷọk ñan juon raan. Ta ear waḷọk ñan orḷọk eo?
marshallese.try_macro: Kajjioñ: kāālōt "Kōṃōḷoḷo orḷọk in oṇāān" āinwōt mejānkajjik eo aṃ, lelōñḷọk oṇāān ṃuri 2 point, innem etal ñan juon iiō.
marshallese.try_inquiry: Kajjioñ: kōṃṃan bōjrak-im-oṇāān-lōñ (eḷap orḷọk in oṇāān + GDP ej wōtlọk) kōn kein tōbtōb ko reiiettata kwōj maroñ.
marshallese.reference_tool_group: Kein jerbal in lale kōn ekonomi
marshallese.glossary_copied: Eṃōj kopiik naan ko — likūti ilo jeje ko aṃ
marshallese.play_the_simulations_to_discover_econo: Ikkure kōn kein kōṃṃan kein bwe kwōn lo ḷōmṇak in ekonomi! Kajjojo men ej waḷọk ej katakin eok juon ḷōmṇak ekāāl im ej kobaḷọk ijin.
marshallese.quiz_failed_offline_hint: Ear jab tōprak an kōṃṃan teej eo — kajjioñ Kajjitōk Pen ko ilo pāāntōn in lale (rej jerbal ilo ejjeḷọk internet)
marshallese.scenario_complete_3: . Waanjoñak ko rej bar itok — kwōmaroñ ke kōṃṃan eḷapḷọk jān laajrak eo aṃ?
marshallese.economic_history_timeline: 📅 Laajrak in Iien in Bwebwenato in Ekonomi
marshallese.see_how_inflation_erodes_purchasing_po: Lale ewi wāween an orḷọk in oṇāān kadikḷọk kajoor in wia ilo iien etto. Juon taḷa rainin eḷapḷọk oṇāān jān juon taḷa ilju!
marshallese.the_economy_moves_through_repeating_cy: Ekonomi ej etal ilo doulul ko rej bar waḷọk wōt, eddekḷọk innem dikḷọk. Ñe jej jeḷā ia eo jej pād ie ilo doulul eo, jemaroñ ba ta eo enaaj waḷọk tokālik.
marshallese.compound_interest_is_the_eighth_wonder: "Orḷọk kobaḷọk ej men in bwilōñ eo kein ka ruwalitōk ilo laḷ in." — Albert Einstein (rej ba ear ba)
marshallese.schools_of_economic_thought: 🏛️ Jar in Ḷōmṇak ko in Ekonomi
marshallese.economists_disagree_different_schools_: Ri-meḷeḷe in ekonomi rej jumae doon! Jar in ḷōmṇak ko rej oktak rej leḷọk uwaak ko rej oktak ñan kajjitōk ko wōt juon. Ñe kwōj meḷeḷe lale kein, ej jipañ eok bwe kwōn lukkuun ḷōmṇak kōn karōk in ekonomi.
marshallese.markets_range_from_perfect_competition: Ṃakete ko rej jino jān iāekwōj eweeppān (elōñ ri-wiakake, ṃweiuk ko wōt juon) ñan juon wōt ri-wiakake (juon wōt, ṃweiuk make iaan). Kōttūr kajjojo bwe kwōn katak ḷapḷọk:
marshallese.gross_domestic_product_measures_the_to: Gross Domestic Product ej joñe aolepen oṇāān in ṃweiuk im jerbal otemjej rej kōṃṃani ilowaan tōrerein juon aelōñ ilo juon iiō. Erkein wāween an ajej ñan Amedka:
marshallese.as_price_quantity_demanded_consumers_b: Ñe oṇāān ↑, joñan rej kōṇaane ↓. Ri-wia rej wia edikḷọk ñe oṇāān ej wanlōñḷọk. Lain in kōṇaan ej wanlaḷḷọk.
marshallese.as_price_quantity_supplied_producers_m: Ñe oṇāān ↑, joñan rej leḷọk ↑. Ri-kōṃṃan rej kōṃṃan eḷapḷọk ñe eḷap oṇāān. Lain in leḷọk ej wanlōñḷọk.
marshallese.where_supply_meets_demand_this_e_point: Ijo leḷọk ej iioon kōṇaan ie. Point in "E" ej make likūt oṇāān in ṃakete (P*) im joñan (Q*).
marshallese.shifts_vs_movements: Ṃakūtkūt in Lain im Ṃakūtkūt Ioon Lain:
marshallese.changing_the_price_moves_along_a_curve: Ñe kwōj ukōt oṇāān, kwōj eṃṃakūt IOON lain eo. Men ko jān ilikin (teknoloji, ṃani, kōṇaan an armej) rej ṂAKŪTKŪT aolepen lain eo.
marshallese.demand_shifted_right_more_people_want_: ▶ Kōṇaan ear eṃṃakūt ñan ANMOOṆ — Elōñḷọk armej rej kōṇaan ṃweiuk in (bōlen ear ḷapḷọk aer ṃani, ak ear buñbuñḷọk). Men in ej lelōñḷọk oṇāān in iioon IM joñan in iioon.
marshallese.demand_shifted_left_fewer_people_want_: ▶ Kōṇaan ear eṃṃakūt ñan ANMIIÑ — Ediklọk armej rej kōṇaan ṃweiuk in (juon men in pinej jenkwan ear dikḷọk oṇāān, ak ear oktak kōṇaan an armej). Oṇāān IM joñan rejro wōtlọk.
marshallese.supply_shifted_right_producers_can_mak: ▶ Leḷọk ear eṃṃakūt ñan ANMOOṆ — Ri-kōṃṃan remaroñ kōṃṃan eḷapḷọk kōn oṇāān edik (teknoloji ekāāl, edikḷọk oṇāān in men in jerbal). Oṇāān ej wōtlọk, ak joñan ej wanlōñḷọk.
marshallese.supply_shifted_left_production_became_: ▶ Leḷọk ear eṃṃakūt ñan ANMIIÑ — Ear penḷọk an kōṃṃan (jorrāān in lañ, kien ko rekāāl). Oṇāān ej wanlōñḷọk, ak joñan ej wōtlọk.
marshallese.demand_flatter: — eṃṃanḷọk an pikin, PIDODOḶỌK: ri-wia rej ṃōkaj aer ukōt ñe oṇāān ej oktak (men in ṃōṇōṇō, ṃweiuk ewōr men in pinej jenkwan).
marshallese.demand_steeper: — eutiejḷọk, PENḶỌK: ri-wia rejjab kanooj ukōt joñan ñe oṇāān ej ṃakūtkūt (men in aikuj āinwōt kiaj ak uno in nañinmej).
marshallese.supply_flatter: — eṃṃanḷọk an pikin, PIDODOḶỌK: ri-kōṃṃan remaroñ ṃōkaj aer lelōñḷọk ak kadikḷọk kōṃṃan (ṃweiuk in ṃakiin).
marshallese.supply_steeper: — eutiejḷọk, PENḶỌK: epen an ṃōkaj oktak joñan kōṃṃan (eṃ, bwidej in kallib, jea in kōjañjañ).
marshallese.tax_incidence_1: — juon "kōtaan owōj" ej peḷḷọk ikōtaan men eo ri-wia ej kōḷḷā im men eo ri-wiakake ej bōke, im jet wia ko eṃṃan ñan erro jimor rej jokwōd (LUUJ EO EJJEḶỌK EJ BŌKE). Kiiō ri-wia ro rej inek enañin ~
marshallese.tax_incidence_3: % — rājet eo ePEN ḶỌK (eutiejḷọk) ej inek eḷapḷọk iien otemjej. Ukōt kein tōbtōb in pidodoin im lale an oktak ajej eo.
marshallese.slope_note: 📚 Pikin = pidodo: armej rej kanooj ukōt aer kōṃṃan ñe oṇāān ej oktak (men in ṃōṇōṇō, men in pinej jenkwan). Eutiej = pen: rejjab maroñ ṃōkaj aer ukōt (kiaj, uno in nañinmej). Lale wōn ej inek owōj ñe kwōj ukōt lain ko.
marshallese.measures_how_much_quantity_demanded_ch: ej joñe ewi joñan an oktak joñan eo rej kōṇaane ñe oṇāān ej oktak.
marshallese.goods_luxury_items_products_with_subst: ṃweiuk (men in ṃōṇōṇō, ṃweiuk ewōr men in pinej jenkwan) rej lo an ḷap an wōtlọk kōṇaan ñe edik wōt an wanlōñḷọk oṇāān.
marshallese.goods_necessities_like_medicine_gasoli: ṃweiuk (men in aikuj āinwōt uno in nañinmej, kiaj) kōṇaan ñan er ejjab oktak meñe oṇāān ej oktak.
marshallese.luxury_goods_restaurants_vacations: Ṃweiuk in ṃōṇōṇō, ṃōn ṃōñā, iien kakkije
marshallese.revenue_unchanged_by_price: Ṃani ej deḷọñ ejjab oktak kōn oṇāān
marshallese.medicine_gasoline_utilities: Uno in nañinmej, kiaj, jarom im dān
marshallese.cash_flow_warning: ⚠️ Ṃani eo aṃ ej ilaḷ jān jirouk — kwōj kōḷḷā eḷapḷọk jān aṃ bōk. Kajjioñ juon jikin jokwe edik oṇāān, kadikḷọk % in likūt ṃani, ak kōḷḷā ṃuri eo ṃokta jān an kobaḷọk.
marshallese.months_of_expenses: allōñ in kōḷḷā ilo ṃani ilo pā
marshallese.emergency_fund_target: ri-kapilōk rej ba bwe kwōn kōjparok 3–6 allōñ
marshallese.flow_invested: Eṃōj likūte ilo likūt ṃani (ej aṃ wōt!)
marshallese.flow_growth: Eddekḷọk in kobban ṃōttan ko (ilowaan likūt ṃani)
marshallese.flow_debt_interest: Orḷọk in ṃuri eṃōj kobaḷọke (10% APR)
marshallese.last_year_flow: 🧾 Etal-itak in ṃani ilo iiō eo ḷọk
marshallese.flow_footnote: * ejjab ṃōttan ṃani ilo pā — eddekḷọk ej kobaḷọk ilowaan kobban ṃōttan ko aṃ; orḷọk in ṃuri ej kobaḷọk ilowaan ṃuri eo aṃ.
marshallese.lower_monthly_cost_flexibility: Edikḷọk oṇāān ilo allōñ, im emaroñ oktak
marshallese.build_equity_but_mortgage_maintenance: Kwōj kalōk ṃweiuk, ak ewōr ṃuri in eṃ + kōkāāl
marshallese.cheapest_option_save_more: Eo edik tata oṇāān, kwōnaaj kōjparok eḷapḷọk
marshallese.investment_allocation_of_annual_salary: 📊 Ajej in Likūt Ṃani (% in wōṇāān in juon iiō eṃōj likūte)
marshallese.describe_what_kind_of_market_you_want_: Kwaḷọk kain ṃakete rōt kwōj kōṇaan wia ie. AI enaaj kōṃṃan 5 koṃbani in ḷōmṇak kōn ṃani ko rej āinwōt ṃool.
marshallese.e_g_renewable_energy_startups_gaming_c: waanjoñak: "koṃbani ekāāl in kajoor ekāāl", "koṃbani in ikkure", "jerbal ilo lañ", ak likūte ejjeḷọk bwe en kobaḷọk aolep...
marshallese.index_lesson: 📚 Index eo rej wia-im-dāpij ej anjọ jān aṃ wia im wiakake. Elōñ ri-wia rej jerbal iien otemjej rej ettā jān ro rej dāpij wōt aolep — men in unin an index fund ko erom naan in kapilōk eo ṃokta.
marshallese.concentration_warning: ⚠️ Eḷapḷọk jān 70% in oṇāān in ṃōttan ko aṃ ej pād ilo juon wōt koṃbani. Ajej ṃani ej kadikḷọk jorrāān ñe juon koṃbani ej buñ — ajej ṃani eo aṃ.
marshallese.reset_market_generate_new_companies: ♻ Bar Jino Ṃakete & Kōṃṃan Koṃbani Ekāāl
marshallese.type_any_business_idea_and_ai_will_gen: Jeje jabdewōt ḷōmṇak in peejnej im AI enaaj kōṃṃan oṇāān in jino, oṇāān in raan otemjej, im oṇāān in wiakake. Innem kōjerbale raan ñan raan!
marshallese.e_g_food_truck_dog_walking_tutoring_ba: waanjoñak: tūrak in ṃōñā, etetal ippān kidu, jipañ katak, ṃōn kōṃṃan pilawā, kōṃṃan app...
marshallese.biz_cash_warning: ⚠️ Peejnej eo aṃ ej luuj ṃani — ṃani ej ilaḷ jān jirouk. Lale oṇāān in kajjojo ṃōttan: oṇāān eo ej bōk ke oṇāān kōṃṃan juon ṃōttan IM ṃōttan eo aṃ in oṇāān ko rejjab oktak? Lelōñḷọk oṇāān, kadikḷọk oṇāān in jerbal, ak kalōk buñbuñ — erkein kein tōbtōb ko aṃ.
marshallese.below_cost_warning: ⚠️ Oṇāān ej ilaḷ jān oṇāān kōṃṃan juon ṃōttan — kwōj luuj ṃani ilo KAJJOJO wia.
marshallese.high_price_hint: 📚 Eḷap an utiej oṇāān jān eo eṃōj kwaḷọke — kōtmāne bwe kōṇaan enaaj wōtlọk (pidodoin oṇāān).
marshallese.shock_oil_lesson: Idiñ ilo leḷọk ej lelōñḷọk oṇāān IM kadikḷọk kōṃṃan ilo iien eo wōt — men in ej kōṃṃan bōjrak-im-oṇāān-lōñ, āinwōt bōbrae eo an OPEC ilo 1973.
marshallese.shock_tech_lesson: Eddekḷọk in kōṃṃan ej men eo eṃṃan im ejjeḷọk oṇāān: ñe kajjojo ri-jerbal ej kōṃṃan eḷapḷọk, GDP ej wanlōñḷọk im ejjab kōṃṃan orḷọk in oṇāān.
marshallese.shock_financial_lesson: Ñe epen an armej bōk ṃuri, kōṇaan ej jako: GDP, oṇāān, im jerbal rej jiṃor wōtlọk, āinwōt 2008.
marshallese.shock_trade_war_lesson: Owōj in ṃweiuk jān ilikin ej lelōñḷọk oṇāān ilowaan aelōñ eo, im ej kōṃṃan bwe aelōñ ko jet ren bar iden-oṇe ñan ro rej jilkinḷọk ṃweiuk.
marshallese.shock_consumer_boom_lesson: Kōtmāne ej kaṃakūt ekonomi: ñe baaṃle ko rej eñjake bwe rej pād ilo jokane, rej kōḷḷā ṃani, im ṃani eo juon ej kōḷḷā ej ṃani an bar juon armej.
marshallese.report_spend_up_2: % in GDP, ear kobaḷọk kōṇaan (wāween an Keynes ba) — ak ṃuri ko rej aikuj kōḷḷā ilo iien ej itok.
marshallese.report_spend_down_2: % in GDP, im men in ear bōk kōṇaan jān ekonomi eo.
marshallese.report_tax_up_2: % ear kadikḷọk ṃani ippān baaṃle ko ñan aer kōḷḷā, im ear kōṃōḷoḷo kōṇaan.
marshallese.report_tax_down_2: % ear kalapḷọk ṃani ippān baaṃle ko ñan aer kōḷḷā, im ear kalapḷọk kōṇaan.
marshallese.report_rate_high: 🏦 Oṇāān ṃuri ilōñ jān joñan eoḷap ~3% ear kōṃṃan bwe en pen bōk ṃuri — likūt ṃani im kāālōt ri-jerbal raar ruṃwijḷọk (kein bōbrae in ṃani).
marshallese.report_rate_low: 🏦 Oṇāān ṃuri ilaḷ jān joñan eoḷap ear kōṃṃan bwe en pidodo bōk ṃuri — kōṇaan eo ṃuri ej kōṃṃane ear wanlōñḷọk (kein kaṃōkajḷọk in ṃani).
marshallese.report_okun_2: % ippān joñan eo eṃṃan ~2% ear ukōt ejjeḷọk jerbal ñan
marshallese.goal_missed_inflation: (ear ṃakūtkūt ñan rājet eo bōd — kein tōbtōb ta ej lelōñḷọk oṇāān in bōk ṃuri?)
marshallese.goal_missed_growth: (ta ej kobaḷọk kōṇaan — kōḷḷā, kadikḷọk owōj, ak ṃuri epidodo?)
marshallese.goal_missed_unemployment: (Kien an Okun: ejjeḷọk jerbal ej wōtlọk ñe eddekḷọk ej ḷapḷọk jān joñan ~2%)
marshallese.policy_goal_label: 🎯 Mejānkajjik in karōk (kāālōt juon, ba ṃokta, innem etal):
marshallese.real_rate_note: 📚 Oṇāān eṃool = oṇāān eṃōj je − orḷọk in oṇāān =
marshallese.real_rate_negative: Ñe oṇāān eṃool ej ilaḷ jān jirouk, ro rej bōk ṃuri rej anjọ im ro rej kōjparok ṃani rej luuj — men in ej lukkuun rōjañ ekonomi.
marshallese.real_rate_positive: Ñe oṇāān eṃool ej ilōñ, ej leḷọk tōḷọk ñan kōjparok ṃani im kaṃōjṇọ bōk ṃuri — ej dāpdep ekonomi.
marshallese.spending_change_2: Oktak in kōḷḷā an kien, pāsōnt in GDP
marshallese.deficit_note: 📚 Ñe kwōj kōḷḷā eḷapḷọk im bōk owōj edikḷọk = kōḷḷā jān ṃuri. Ej rōjañ ekonomi kiiō, ak ṃuri eo ej juon men ro renaaj kōḷḷā owōj tokālik renaaj inek.
marshallese.economy_reset: ♻ Eṃōj bar likūt ekonomi ñan ḷoñtak in 2025
marshallese.macro_model_disclaimer: Juon waanjoñak in ikkure kōn kōkḷaḷ in Keynes ko ilo bok in katak im ejjeḷọk jerbal ekkar ñan kien an Okun — EJJAB juon naan in kanaan. Ekonomi ko reṃool rej pedped ioon kōtmāne, lōke, im wāween laḷ in aolep, im ri-meḷeḷe in ekonomi rej lukkuun jumae doon kōn nōṃba kein (lale Jar in Ḷōmṇak ko ilo pāāntōn in lale).
marshallese.gdp_contracting_unemployment_climbing_: GDP ej dikḷọk. Ejjeḷọk jerbal ej wanlōñḷọk. Aolepen kōṇaan ejjab bwe.
marshallese.rare_and_ugly_high_inflation_low_growt: Ekkā jab waḷọk im enana: eḷap orḷọk in oṇāān + edik eddekḷọk. Āinwōt idiñ eo an OPEC ilo 1970 ko. Epen ñan kōkāāl.
marshallese.growth_strong_but_inflation_spiking_ce: Eḷap eddekḷọk ak orḷọk in oṇāān ej lukkuun wanlōñḷọk. Pāāñ eḷap emaroñ lukkuun bōbrae.
marshallese.gdp_up_inflation_contained_goldilocks_: GDP ej wanlōñḷọk, orḷọk in oṇāān eṃōj dāpije. Jikin Goldilocks — emaroñ pād wōt ñan kiiō.
marshallese.small_net_effect_policy_levers_roughly: Edik jelōt eo. Kein tōbtōb in karōk ko rej enañin jolọk doon.
marshallese.policy_inquiry_predict_the_macro_outco: 🔬 Kajjitōk in Karōk — Ba Ṃokta Ta Enaaj Waḷọk ilo Makro
marshallese.move_four_policy_levers_tax_govt_spend: Ṃakūtkūt emān kein tōbtōb in karōk (owōj, kōḷḷā an kien, oṇāān ṃuri, owōj in ṃweiuk jān ilikin). Ba ṃokta ewi wāween ekonomi ṃokta jān aṃ riiti. Ejjeḷọk kuṇaan, ejjeḷọk kwaḷọk uwaak.
marshallese.tariff_lever: Owōj in ṃweiuk jān ilikin, pāsōnt
marshallese.your_hypothesis_which_lever_has_the_mo: Ḷōmṇak eo aṃ (kein tōbtōb ta eo ri-meḷeḷe in ekonomi rej jumae doon kake eḷaptata ilo mour eṃool? Etke?)
marshallese.e_g_tariffs_hit_prices_fast_but_the_gd: waanjoñak: owōj in ṃweiuk jān ilikin ej ṃōkaj an jelōt oṇāān ak jelōt eo ñan GDP ej pedped ioon aer bar iden-oṇe...
marshallese.i_m_stuck_show_open_questions: 🤔 Ibōjrak — kwaḷọk kajjitōk ko rej peḷḷọk
marshallese.open_questions_no_answer_key: Kajjitōk ko rej peḷḷọk (ejjeḷọk uwaak eṃōj ṇooje)
marshallese.what_combination_produces_stagflation_: Kobaḷọk ta ej kōṃṃan "bōjrak-im-oṇāān-lōñ"? Etke ear kanooj metak ilo kien ilo 1970 ko?
marshallese.tax_cuts_and_govt_spending_both_stimul: Kadikḷọk owōj im kōḷḷā an kien erro jimor rej rōjañ GDP. Ewi iaan erro ej kōṃṃan orḷọk in oṇāān eḷapḷọk ñan kajjojo taḷa in rōjañ? Etke?
marshallese.when_would_a_central_bank_deliberately: Ñāāt eo juon pāāñ eḷap enaaj lukkuun kōṇaan KŌṂṂAN wōtlọk in ekonomi? (Volcker 1979–82.)
marshallese.do_tariffs_help_domestic_workers_in_th: Owōj in ṃweiuk jān ilikin ej ke jipañ ri-jerbal ro ilowaan ilo iien etto, ak ej lelōñḷọk oṇāān ñan aolep? Erro jimor ke? Ia eo eṃōj kōtḷọk juon men ie?
marshallese.this_widget_hard_codes_textbook_keynes: Kein jerbal in ej kōjerbal wōt kōkḷaḷ in Keynes ko ilo bok in katak. Kōkḷaḷ ta ko renaaj OKTAK iuṃwin ekonomi in rājet in leḷọk? Iuṃwin MMT? Iuṃwin klaajikōl ekāāl (kōtmāne ekkar ñan ḷōmṇak jiṃwe)? Ia eo waanjoñak in Keynes ej leḷọk kōkḷaḷ ebōd ie ilo nōṃba ko jān laḷ in eṃool?
marshallese.i_can_explain_why_this_policy_mix_yiel: Imaroñ kōmeḷeḷeik etke kobaḷọk in karōk in ej kōṃṃan wāween makro in.
marshallese.explain_in_your_own_words: Kōmeḷeḷe kōn naan ko aṃ make...
marshallese.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Kein jerbal in kajjitōk — ejjeḷọk kuṇaan, ejjeḷọk kwaḷọk, ejjeḷọk lutōk uwaak. Nōṃba kein rej kein jipañ katak wōt, REJJAB juon waanjoñak makro eṃool; uwaak ko reṃool rej pedped ioon karōk in ṃani, jerbal ejjañin obrak, kōtmāne, im wia ippān aelōñ ko jet. Makro ej juon men armej rej jumae doon kake — ri-meḷeḷe in ekonomi rej jumae doon kōn kōkḷaḷ im joñan ko.
